formVerify test form v2 — Landscape A4, DICT_4X4_50 markers (ID 0=TL, 1=TR, 2=BR, 3=BL)
Write ONE digit per box. Received = whole numbers (3 digits). Gross/Nett KG = 3 digits + 1 decimal (printed comma separator).
Print at 100% scale on A4 landscape.
